🏛️ Acropolis View🍸 Rooftop Bar

Check Availability

Overview

Elegant boutique hotel combining neoclassical architecture with modern luxury.

Who Should Consider O&B Athens Boutique Hotel

O&B Athens Boutique Hotel is a 4-star upscale price-signal hotel in Monastiraki, with an Acropolis-view signal and a rooftop-bar signal. It is tagged for boutique, couples, wellness.

  • Compare the area on the Monastiraki hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • Compare it with other Athens rooftop bar hotels.

Amenities

SpaRestaurantBarGym

✓ Pros

  • Beautiful building
  • Excellent spa
  • Quiet rooms

✗ Cons

  • Pricey restaurant

Location

Located in Monastiraki, 8-12 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 8-12 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro
